ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Completed"), RecordTypeId = '0123E000000YF8l', OR( ISBLANK(What_brought_them_to_us__c) , ISBLANK(What_is_the_Prospects_Role_Authority__c) , ISBLANK(What_is_Need_for_SimilarWeb__c) , ISBLANK(Post_Meeting_Notes__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The following fields are required upon meeting completion: What brought them to us? Prospect's Role & Responsibilities? What is Need for SimilarWeb? Post meeting notes
